title: The Fellow Furries Mod
description:
A mod that adds furry and protogen stuff into mc
including songs, blocks and more!
body:
Mod created for my best friend whos a protogen because why not?

The Fellow Furries Mod Contains Stuff For Furries And Stuff  
V1.0 Contains:  
- A Toaster Block  
- Edible Ram  
- A Jazz Emu Song (that unfortunately due to a strange bug ends at around like 7 seconds in)  

I hope you guys enjoy!
